hand_rating_placeholders._HAND_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED_: structural pass is necessary but not sufficient. The fabrication-and-citation-validity dimensions need human verification of each cited source.
hand_rating_placeholders.rater_notes: Sample-validated 2/33 URLs against live pages (2026-04-28): 1Password Business $7.99/user/month and Bitwarden Teams $4 / Enterprise $6 both match exactly. Agent's sources.md is unusually transparent — flags the pages that 404'd (e.g. https://bitwarden.com/security/, https://bitwarden.com/business/) and uses third-party fallbacks (ZDNet, PCMag) when vendor pricing pages don't list business tiers (LastPass, Dashlane, Keeper). Decision-criteria table has 7 weighted criteria. Recommendation is specific (1Password Business, $7.99/user/month, $4,794/year for 50 seats). Context appropriately cites Series-B SaaS, 50-engineer team, shadow-IT remediation. citations_valid_pct = 90 reflects 2/2 sampled valid + agent's own admitted 4xx pages; full validation pass would tighten this number.
